## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct an interview with J Smith for a Design Engineer (Senior to Principal) role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [J Smith has extensive experience in design engineering, particularly in 3D web experiences and front-end development](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [GrowthX is seeking a design engineer to work on both client-facing projects and internal software development](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [The role involves managing the entire design and development process for web properties, including client work and internal projects](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2459.0)

## Topics

### J Smith's Background and Experience

  - [Over 10 years of experience in design and front-end development](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Recently worked at Nike Virtual Studios on 3D web experiences](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Strong background in React, Three.js, and 3D web technologies](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Experience with content management systems like Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Passionate about creating premium user interfaces with attention to micro-interactions and performance](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

### GrowthX Company Overview

  - [VC-backed company with an agency model, also building their own software](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Focus on automating content production at scale through AI](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Current design team consists of 4-5 staff members and about 10 contractors](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Challenges include designing complex interfaces for marketers and executing client work](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### Project Example: Nike's Max's Lab

  - [3D web experience for marketing and selling shoes](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Implemented navigation through 3D scenes using NavMesh technology](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Developed workflow for designers to create 3D scenes in Blender with metadata for web implementation](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Focused on creating a premium user experience with attention to interaction details](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

### Design Engineering Role at GrowthX

  - [Primary focus on client ops and web properties](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2459.0)
  - [Responsibilities include owning the design, implementation, shipping, and QA process for client websites](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
  - [Work involves collaborating with internal designers, external agencies, and client teams](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [Also responsible for GrowthX's internal marketing sites and product pages](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)

### J Smith's Approach to Quality and Team Management

  - [Emphasizes the importance of micro-interactions and performance in creating premium interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Focuses on building relationships with team members to improve overall product quality](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [Uses a collaborative approach to problem-solving and skill development within the team](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)

## Next Steps

  - [J Smith to follow up with any additional questions via email or through TalkCare](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2704.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue the interview process and evaluate J Smith's fit for the Design Engineer role](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2692.0)
  - [Potential further discussions on specific projects and challenges at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/QsYUZroqFcXf9v8yt1V2CWxLM_4NiRob?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
